title: Senior Frontend Developer at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
